

/****** Object:  Table [dbo].[__STG_Company]    Script Date: 4/2/2020 5:38:11 PM ******/
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO

SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE[dbo].[__STG_Company]
(

   [Id][int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,

  [Name] [nvarchar] (250) NULL,
	[LagalName] [nvarchar] (500) NULL,
	[Type] [nvarchar] (100) NULL,
	[Description] [nvarchar] (500) NULL,
	[LogoPath]
[nvarchar]
(max) NULL,
	[IsActive] [bit] NULL,
	[CreateUserId]
[int]
NOT NULL,
	[CreateTime] [datetime]
NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateUserId] [int] NULL,
	[LastUpdateTime] [datetime] NULL,
 CONSTRAINT[PK___STG_Company] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED
(
   [Id] ASC
)WITH(PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON[PRIMARY]
) ON[PRIMARY] TEXTIMAGE_ON[PRIMARY]
GO

ALTER TABLE[dbo].[__STG_Company] ADD CONSTRAINT[DF___STG_Company_IsActive]  DEFAULT((0)) FOR[IsActive]
GO

ALTER TABLE[dbo].[__STG_Company] ADD CONSTRAINT[DF___STG_Company_CreateTime]  DEFAULT(getdate()) FOR[CreateTime]
GO
